overrides.override_summary: Non-competes upon termination/expiration are generally unenforceable in California
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisees effectively have no post-term noncompete restriction

overrides.override_summary: CA Corp Code 31512 voids waiver of Franchise Investment Law rights; B&P Code 20010 voids waiver of Franchise Relations Act rights
overrides.why_it_matters: General release at renewal/transfer cannot waive CA franchise law claims

overrides.override_summary: CA B&P Code 20000-20043 provides rights concerning termination, transfer, non-renewal; law controls over inconsistent agreement provisions
overrides.why_it_matters: California franchisees have statutory protections on termination beyond franchise agreement

overrides.override_summary: Binding arbitration in Orange County, CA. Franchisees encouraged to consult counsel re applicability of B&P 20040.5, CCP 1281, Federal Arbitration Act
overrides.why_it_matters: Arbitration venue stays in CA but state law may provide additional protections

overrides.override_summary: Section 4 of Illinois Franchise Disclosure Act governs applicable law provisions
overrides.why_it_matters: Illinois franchise law may override California choice of law

overrides.override_summary: Section 4 of Illinois Franchise Disclosure Act applies to jurisdiction/venue
overrides.why_it_matters: IL franchisees may have venue protections

overrides.override_summary: Indiana law applies to franchise agreements with IN franchisees. General release may be limited
overrides.why_it_matters: Indiana franchise law provides protections

overrides.override_summary: General release upon renewal/transfer may not apply to extent prohibited by Maryland law
overrides.why_it_matters: MD franchisees protected from franchise law claim waivers at renewal/transfer

overrides.override_summary: Franchise fees not payable until franchisee opens for business
overrides.why_it_matters: MD franchisees do not pay initial fee until opening — protects against pre-opening risk

overrides.override_summary: MN franchise law protections apply; venue may not be restricted to CA
overrides.why_it_matters: MN franchisees may litigate in Minnesota rather than California

overrides.override_summary: MN franchise law may override CA governing law provision
overrides.why_it_matters: Minnesota law may govern the franchise relationship for MN franchisees

overrides.override_summary: No waiver of NY General Business Law Article 33 claims; no disclaimer of reliance on franchisor statements
overrides.why_it_matters: NY franchisees protected from waiver of state franchise law claims and reliance disclaimers

overrides.override_summary: Article 33 of NY General Business Law rights preserved regardless of choice of law
overrides.why_it_matters: NY franchise law applies even if agreement specifies CA law

overrides.override_summary: Restrictive covenants subject to Section 9-08, N.D.C.C.
overrides.why_it_matters: ND noncompete restrictions may be unenforceable under ND law

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require ND franchisees to arbitrate at location remote from business site; cannot require consent to out-of-state jurisdiction
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchisees may arbitrate/litigate in North Dakota, not California

overrides.override_summary: Franchise agreements cannot specify non-ND governing law
overrides.why_it_matters: ND law governs for ND franchisees, not California law

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require consent to liquidated damages or termination penalties
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchisees protected from penalty clauses

overrides.override_summary: Section 12.3 jury trial waiver is deleted for ND
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchisees retain right to jury trial

overrides.override_summary: No waiver of ND franchise law claims; no disclaimer of reliance
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchisees protected from franchise law claim waivers

overrides.override_summary: VA Securities Act provisions apply
overrides.why_it_matters: Virginia franchise law protections

overrides.override_summary: WA Franchise Investment Protection Act provisions apply
overrides.why_it_matters: Washington franchise law protections

overrides.override_summary: WI franchise law provisions apply
overrides.why_it_matters: Wisconsin franchise law protections
